description: Machine-readable component registry for AI-MiniHarmony. Use this file as the fast entry point before reading component references and templates.

variant.description: tab 数量 / 特殊变体

items.description: 页签项插槽，每个子节点 .harmony-bottomtab__tab 结构

activeIndex.description: 激活 tab 索引 (0-based)，由消费端在 items 渲染时控制

tabIcon.description: [1bar] 左侧圆形背板内 HMSymbol icon glyph

avatarImage.description: [multibar] 折叠bar 内头像 元素

type.description: 按钮类型，决定背景填充与文本颜色

state.description: 交互状态，驱动 overlay / focus-ring / spinner / opacity

content.description: 按钮文本或富文本内容插槽

icon.description: [optional] 前置图标 SVG 插槽，图标尺寸 = 当前 font-size

spinnerSvg.description: [loading] 24×24 spinner SVG 片段，由 {{#loading}} 条件块包裹

content_patterns.description: 纯文本作为 button 子节点，颜色由类型样式继承
前置图标 SVG 插槽 + 文本，gap:4px，图标尺寸 = font-size
完整 DOM：overlay + focus-ring + [spinner] + [icon] + content

subtitle.description: 副标题文本 (仅 big / secondary)

leadingIcon.description: HMSymbol glyph HTML entity (secondary: F00DA / drawer: F0163)

actions.description: 动作按钮数组，每项含 actionIcon (glyph) + actionAria (label)

searchMode.description: 搜索模式，决定是否显示 Search action 区域 (voice+divider+button)

state.description: 交互状态，驱动 overlay / focus-ring / padding / gap / cancel 显隐

value.description: 输入值文本，typing/output 状态使用

searchIcon.description: 搜索图标 SVG 插槽 (18×18 magnifying glass)

cancelIcon.description: 清除图标 SVG 插槽 (16×16 xmark)

voiceIcon.description: 语音图标 SVG 插槽 (16×16 microphone)

variant_matrix.note: icon-hover/icon-focus/icon-pressed 仅在 ON 模式下有效

content_patterns.description: OFF Normal: icon(18×18) + placeholder text, padding 8/12, gap 8
OFF Actived: icon + cursor(1.5×24) + placeholder, gap 6
OFF Hover/Pressed: overlay 覆盖全容器, padding 9/12
OFF Focus: ::before 伪元素 2px ring inset:-2px
OFF Typing: icon + value text + cursor + cancel button(32×32)
OFF Output: icon + value text + cancel button
ON Normal: icon + placeholder + voice(32×32) + divider(1×12) + Search button, padding 4/4/4/12
ON Hover/Pressed/Focus: overlay/ring 仅作用于 Search button
ON IconHover/IconFocus/IconPressed: overlay/ring 仅作用于 voice 图标 (圆形 50%)
ON Typing/Output: cancel 替换 voice 位置, 保留 divider + Search button

selected.description: 选中态，驱动轨道颜色 (ON=蓝/OFF=灰) 和拇指位置

state.description: 交互状态，驱动 overlay / focus-ring / disabled opacity

numeric_baseline.focus_ring_css_inset: -4px (补偿 border 向内绘制, 映射 strokeAlign:OUTSIDE)

content_patterns.description: ON + Enabled: 轨道蓝色, 拇指右侧 left:18px 无描边
ON + Hover/Pressed: ::after 伪元素 overlay 覆盖轨道 (4.7%/9.8%)
ON + Focus: ::before 伪元素 2px ring, inset:-4px, border-radius:14px (Pixso strokeAlign:OUTSIDE CSS 补偿)
ON + Disabled: opacity:0.4, cursor:default, pointer-events:none
OFF + Enabled: 轨道灰色, 拇指左侧 left:2px, 1px box-shadow 描边
OFF + Hover/Pressed/Focus: overlay/ring 同 ON 模式
OFF + Disabled: opacity:0.4 (同 ON)

iconGlyph.description: HMSymbol glyph, 默认 circle_dashed F0134

icon2.description: 第二 icon 条件块 (#icon2, Mini 变体)

icon2Aria.description: 第二 icon 无障碍标签

content_patterns.description: Max 328×496: 大容量竖版卡片, 1 icon bottom-right
Larger 328×328: 正方形卡片, 1 icon bottom-right
Medium 328×156: 横向卡片, 1 icon bottom-right
Small 156×156: 紧凑正方形卡片, 1 icon bottom-right
Mini 328×56: 横向窄卡片, 2 icons (left + right 垂直居中)
{{content}} 插槽自由填充, 容器不限制内部布局

variant.description: 变体枚举，控制 chip 数量、icon 显隐、icon-btn 显隐

chips.description: chip 列表数组，每项含 title (string)、isActivated (boolean)、icon (optional boolean，仅 icontab 使用)

showIconBtn.description: 是否渲染 .more icon button (dot_grid_2x2)，tab-with-icon 变体为 true

notes.tab: 6 chips，无 icon，无 icon-btn，num 可见
notes.icontab: 4 chips，每个 chip title 左侧 star_fill 图标 (16×16)，无 num，无 icon-btn

numeric_baseline.chip: height 36px, radius 20px, padding 8px 16px, internal gap 6px, width auto (RESIZE_TO_FIT)

content_patterns.description: tab / tab-with-icon 变体 chip：仅 title 文本，无图标
icontab 变体 chip：star_fill 图标 (16×16) + title，图标居左，order: -1
tab-with-icon 变体尾部 icon button：40×40 circle，dot_grid_2x2 (24×24)，aria-label="更多"

variant.description: toolbar 方向与 item 数量变体

label.description: item 标签文本，默认 Tab

isHover.description: 静态 hover 态：添加 harmony-toolbar__item--hover

isPressed.description: 静态 pressed 态：添加 harmony-toolbar__item--pressed

isFocus.description: 静态 focus 态：添加 harmony-toolbar__item--focus

ariaLabel.description: button aria-label；空 label 或 label 不足以说明功能时使用

content_patterns.description: OFF item：F0025 glyph + label，aria-pressed=false
ON item：harmony-toolbar__item--active + F0021 glyph + label，aria-pressed=true
静态状态类：hover/pressed/focus/disabled，对应模板布尔变量 isHover/isPressed/isFocus/isDisabled
超长 label 在固定 item 槽内单行 ellipsis，不改变 root/item 几何

variant.description: 变体类型，决定行高、左侧布局、右侧图标

left-layout.description: 左内容区布局方向：vertical(纯文本) / horizontal(appicon) / horizontal-sm(dot)

left-content.description: 左内容区完整 HTML 片段（含 title/aux/appicon/dot 叶变量）

aux1.description: 第一行辅助文本（14px Regular），2lines / icon2lines / 3lines 使用

aux2.description: 第二行辅助文本（14px Regular），仅 3lines 使用

right-clamp.description: 右侧文本行数类名：''=1行, ' harmony-list__right-text--clamp2'=2行

right-icon.description: 右侧图标 HTML 片段（chevron HMSymbol 或 arrow-down CSS triangle）

appicon-src.description: 应用图标图片路径，仅 iconsingle / icon2lines 使用

appicon-alt.description: 应用图标 alt 文本

notes.single: 48px, VERTICAL left (title), right arrow-down, 1-line right text, full-width divider
notes.icondot: 56px, HORIZONTAL-sm left (dot 8×8 + title, gap 12px), right arrow-down, 1-line right text, split dividers (gap=0, left skip 20px)
notes.iconsingle: 64px, HORIZONTAL left (appicon 48×48 + title, gap 16px), right arrow-down, 1-line right text, split dividers (gap=0, left skip 64px)
notes.2lines: 64px, VERTICAL left (title + aux1, gap 2px), right chevron, 2-line clamp right text, full-width divider
notes.icon2lines: 72px, HORIZONTAL left (appicon 48×48 + text-group title+aux1), right chevron, 2-line clamp right text, full-width divider
notes.3lines: 96px, VERTICAL left (title + aux1 + aux2, gap 2px), right chevron, 2-line clamp right text, full-width divider

divider_patterns.full_width: single/2lines/icon2lines/3lines: --right divider as direct child of .harmony-list, spans full 328px
divider_patterns.split: iconsingle/icondot: --left in __left (skip: 64px/20px) + --right in __right, gap=0 seamless join

content_patterns.description: single/2lines/3lines: 左侧纯文本垂直排列，gap 2px。single=title, 2lines=title+aux1, 3lines=title+aux1+aux2
iconsingle/icon2lines: 左侧 appicon(48×48 r=12) + 文本水平排列。iconsingle 为 icon+title, icon2lines 为 icon+text-group(title+aux1)
icondot: 左侧 dot(8×8 CSS circle) + title, 水平排列 gap 12px
2lines/icon2lines/3lines: 右侧 text(2-line clamp) + chevron HMSymbol U+F00D9 12×24, gap 4px
single/icondot/iconsingle: 右侧 text(1-line) + arrow-down CSS triangle 8×6, gap 4px
single/2lines/icon2lines/3lines: --right divider 作为 .harmony-list 直接子节点，全宽 328px
iconsingle/icondot: --left divider 在 __left 内(偏移 64px/20px) + --right divider 在 __right 内, gap=0 无缝衔接
